MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAVID RAYNOR, ERIN DOLLY's Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records From Nonparty Studio 12 Architecture.

No opposition filed. The court first notes that Plaintiffs failed to lodge courtesy copies of moving papers as required by San Francisco Local Rule 2.7. Motion is granted. Request for sanctions is denied because notice of motion re sanctions was defective - the notice of motion re sanctions did not name non-party deponent Studio 12 Architecture. Non-party deponent Studio 12 Architecture shall provide all responsive documents to Plaintiffs within five (5) court days after notice of entry of this order.

Defendant is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling directly by email to the Judge Pro Tem at wlynn@rroyselaw.com.
